Landing.heroSubtitle: Pokédex, competitive builder, damage calculator, meta tools and games. Everything in one place, free, no login required.
Landing.featuresSubtitle: From a full Pokédex to competitive meta analysis.
Landing.ctaSubtitle: No signup required. Your teams and favorites are saved in your browser.
Landing.championsDescription: The most-used Pokémon right now on Pikalytics.

Support.title: Support us
Support.subtitle: PokéHub is 100% free and ad-light. If you use it and like it, a cold drink is always appreciated.
Support.thanks: Thank you for considering it. Truly.

Login.title: Sign in
Login.subtitle: Sync your teams and favorites to the cloud.
Login.magicLink: You'll receive a magic link by email. No passwords.
Login.checkInboxBody: We've sent you an email with the sign-in link.

Profile.editSubtitle: Your profile is public — pick a unique username to activate it.
Profile.usernameHint: 3-20 chars · lowercase letters, numbers, _ and - only
Profile.bioPlaceholder: My favorite type is Grass, I play VGC Reg G…

Onboarding.welcomeBody: Pick a unique username — others will see you as /u/<username>.
Onboarding.avatarBody: Your favorite Pokémon will represent you in profiles and comments.
Onboarding.readyBody: Your profile is active. Some ideas to get started:

Teams.notFoundBody: The link may have expired or the team is no longer public.
Teams.commentPlaceholder: What do you think about this team?
Teams.loginToComment: Sign in to leave a comment.

Guides.title: Competitive Pokémon Guides
Guides.subtitle: Counters, tier lists, leads and the current SV meta.

Replay.title: Replay Analyzer
Replay.subtitle: Paste a Pokémon Showdown battle link and we'll show you the teams, KOs, Tera types and key moments.

Legal.title: License, privacy and credits
Legal.description: Privacy policy, Pokémon copyright, code license and data sources used by PokéHub.
Legal.intro: PokéHub is a fan-made, unofficial project created by <author>Cristian López</author>. Not affiliated with Nintendo, Game Freak or The Pokémon Company.
Legal.ipBody1: Pokémon and all related trademarks, characters, names, sprites and designs are © Nintendo · Game Freak · The Pokémon Company. PokéHub claims no rights over that intellectual property.
Legal.ipBody2: Pokémon images and base data are consumed from <pokeapi>PokéAPI</pokeapi>, a public, fan-run API for fan projects.
Legal.privacyIntro: This section explains what data we store, where, and what for.
Legal.privacyData1: If you do NOT sign in: nothing is sent to external servers. Your teams, favorites and progress live in your browser's localStorage only.
Legal.privacyData2: If you sign in with Supabase: we store your email, teams, favorites, public profile (username, avatar, bio) and notifications. All data lives in our own Supabase database with encryption at rest.
Legal.privacyData3: We share your email only with Supabase (auth provider). We do NOT sell or transfer your data to third parties.
Legal.privacyCookies1: Supabase session (essential): HttpOnly cookies to keep you signed in.
Legal.privacyCookies3: If in the future we enable advertising via Google AdSense, we will display a consent banner to comply with GDPR.
Legal.privacyRightsBody: You can request access, rectification or deletion of your data at any time by contacting the author (see below). Deletion via /admin cascades through account + associated data.
Legal.licenseIntro: PokéHub source code is source-available under a custom license.
Legal.licenseCan3: Run a personal copy for non-commercial use.
Legal.licenseCant1: Host a commercial version without written permission.
Legal.licenseFooter: Read the full license in <license>LICENSE</license>. For commercial licenses: <contact>contact the author</contact>.
Legal.sourcesPokeapi: General data, sprites, evolutions, base stats.
Legal.sourcesSmogon: Monthly usage stats from the SV competitive meta.
Legal.sourcesPikalytics: Top teams and per-Pokémon stats in Pokémon Champions and VGC.
Legal.contact: Contact: via the author's GitHub or repository issues.

Footer.tagline: All-in-one Pokémon · made by fans, for fans.
Footer.disclaimer: PokéHub is a fan-made project, not affiliated with Nintendo, Game Freak or The Pokémon Company. Pokémon and all related names are trademarks of their respective owners.
